news.summary: Dillard's, Inc. reported operating results for the 13 weeks ended May 3, 2025. Total retail sales decreased by 2% and comparable store sales decreased by 1%. Net income was $163.8 million compared to $180.0 million in the previous year, with earnings per share at $10.39 compared to $11.09. Retail gross margin was 45.5% of sales. Operating expenses were $421.7 million (27.6% of sales), down from $426.7 million in the prior year. Ending inventory increased by 6%. The company repurchased $98 million in stock, leaving $1.2 billion in cash and short-term investments. Dillard's operates 272 stores across 30 states and an online store.
news.headline: Dillard's reports Q1 results: net income $163.8M, EPS $10.39; retail sales down 2%, totaling $1.529B. Inventory up 6%.Total retail sales decreased 2%, net income was $163.8 million compared to $180.0 million, EPS was $10.39 compared to $11.09, retail gross margin of 45.5%, operating expenses at $421.7 million ($427.6 million previous year), and inventory increased by 6%.

news.summary: On May 15, 2025, in Copenhagen, Denmark, Trust Stamp (Nasdaq: IDAI) revealed a new collaboration with Partisia to enhance digital security and privacy. The partnership between these two deep tech companies is dedicated to creating a more user-friendly and robust approach to biometric holder binding. This initiative is designed to establish a cutting-edge technology ensuring the trustworthy verification of identity across various digital channels. This strategic move is set to revolutionize the way identities are confirmed online and aims to provide a reliable and secure method for individuals across digital platforms.
news.headline: Partisia and Trust Stamp team up for safer and private digital IDs by linking to biometrics. Aim to enhance security and accessibility across platforms.

news.summary: Pi Network has launched a $100 million fund, Pi Network Ventures, to invest in startups and businesses building on its infrastructure. The fund will invest in initiatives using Pi (PI) tokens and US dollars, focusing on ecosystem growth and innovation. The Pi Foundation, described as an "ownerless" entity, announced that the fund will draw from the 10% of Pi tokens reserved for ecosystem initiatives. Pi Network Ventures aims to increase Pi's utility by integrating it into products and services, bringing more apps and transactions onto the network, and developing new use cases. The organization plans to invest in startups from early stages to Series B funding rounds and beyond in various technology sectors, including generative AI, fintech, e-commerce platforms, and social networks. The fund strives to act like traditional Silicon Valley venture capital firms in its sourcing, selection, and vetting processes to support high-impact startups and businesses.
news.headline: Pi Network to invest $100M in blockchain startups with new venture fund, Pi Network Ventures, focusing on ecosystem growth and innovation.

news.summary: Vienna, Virginia—Spire Global, Inc. (NYSE: SPIR), a leading provider of space-based data and services, revealed its presence at three significant events. Firstly, the 22nd Annual Craig-Hallum Institutional Investor Conference on May 28, 2025, at the Depot Renaissance Hotel in Minneapolis. Following that, the Lytham Partners Spring 2025 Investor Conference on May 29, 2025, will be a virtual event. Lastly, the Stifel 2025 Boston Cross Sector 1x1 Conference is scheduled for June 3, 2025.
news.headline: Spire Global to participate in investor events including Craig-Hallum and Stifel conferences in May-June 2025.

news.summary: Hong Kong, May 15, 2025 - Graphex Group Limited ("Graphex Group" or the "Company") was notified by the NYSE American LLC that its American Depositary Shares (ADSs) with the symbol "GRFX" were delisted and trading was suspended as of May 14, 2025. This action was taken due to the Company's non-compliance with Sections 134 and 1101 of the NYSE American Company Guide for failing to timely file its Form 20-F for the year ended December 31, 2023, with the Securities and Exchange Commission. The NYSE American granted until May 15, 2025, to complete the required filing, which was not met. Consequently, the ADSs are now being traded on the OTC Expert Market under the operation of the OTC Markets Group, Inc.
news.headline: NYSE has delisted Graphex Group's ADSs, trading suspended, to move to OTC Expert Market. Hong Kong shares unaffected.

news.summary: Encouraging shareholders to support only the eight Brookdale nominees listed on the blue proxy card, the company is urging votes in favor. (NYSE: BKD) disclosed their stance for the upcoming shareholder vote.
news.headline: Brookdale urges shareholders to vote "FOR" only 8 nominees on BLUE proxy card. Proxy statement filed.

news.summary: Bitcoin is currently in a battle to reach a $100,000 price and a $2 trillion market cap, with dips below six figures possible but the odds favoring bulls. The analyst filbfilb believes Bitcoin is in a bullish position, especially as it fights to flip the $2 trillion mark from resistance to support. The market is also anticipating an altcoin comeback, with ETH/BTC needing to hit the 0.03 inflection point. Bitcoin's dominance of the crypto market cap is fading, paving the way for the potential resurgence of altcoins. Analysts are optimistic about Bitcoin's future, with price targets set at $120,000 in the short term and potentially surpassing $150,000 in June. Despite possible short-term pullbacks, the overall outlook for Bitcoin remains positive. Investors are advised to conduct their own research before making investment decisions.
news.headline: Analyst: Bitcoin faces $100,000 battle & aims for $2 trillion cap. Altcoins could surge. BTC seeks $110,000 soon, $150,000 in June. Bulls strong.

news.summary: Pi Network, a mobile-first blockchain, announced the launch of a $100 million fund, Pi Network Ventures, aimed at investing in initiatives leveraging its infrastructure. The fund will consist of $100 million in Pi tokens and USD, with a focus on startups contributing to the Pi Network ecosystem. The Pi Foundation, backing Pi Network, is an ownerless entity, allocating 10% of its Pi tokens to fund ecosystem initiatives. Pi Network Ventures will support startups integrating Pi into their products and services, aiming to enhance Pi's utility and bring more apps and transactions onto the network. The strategy involves investing in startups from early stages to Series B funding rounds and beyond, with a focus beyond crypto investments into various technology sectors. The fund aims to adopt traditional Silicon Valley venture capital practices in sourcing, selecting, and supporting high-impact businesses.
news.headline: Pi Network launches $100M fund to invest in blockchain startups, aiming to boost ecosystem growth and adoption.

news.headline: Infosys partners with DNB Bank ASA to ramp up digital transformation: modernizing IT, enhancing customer experience.

Scott Barbour, the President and Chief Executive Officer of Advanced Drainage Systems, expressed gratitude for this development.
news.headline: Advanced Drainage Systems increases quarterly cash dividend to $0.72 per share, up by 13% from previous year. CEO Scott Barbour.

news.summary: Trimble, a leading company in the transportation industry, is hosting its annual Trimble Insight Tech Conference from November 16 to 18, 2025 in Westminster, Colorado. Trimble, listed on Nasdaq as TRMB, is known for showcasing cutting-edge technologies and trends in transportation at this celebrated event every year.
news.headline: Trimble opens registration for 2025 Insight Tech Conference in Colorado from November 16-18. Nasdaq: TRMB.

news.summary: Two recently conducted randomized trials have demonstrated the superior early patient experience with the UroLift™ System for Benign Prostatic Hyperplasia (BPH). The trials directly compared the UroLift™ System with other treatment options and found that patients reported improved outcomes and satisfaction when treated with the UroLift™ System. This advancement offers promise for individuals suffering from BPH, with data from the trials showing a significant enhancement in patient experience with a success rate ranging from 1 to 2. The results emphasize the effectiveness of the UroLift™ System in providing a better early patient experience compared to alternative treatment methods for BPH.
news.headline: Teleflex presents new data at 2025 AUA meeting showing UroLift™ System superiority in 2 BPH trials.

news.summary: On May 15, 2025, Hyperscale Data, Inc. disclosed plans to resume Bitcoin mining through its subsidiary Sentinum, Inc. at a Montana site by June 10, 2025. Hyperscale Data, a diversified holding company trading on NYSE American under GPUS, is taking this step to reinitiate operations after temporary cessation. This decision marks a strategic move in the cryptocurrency sector, as Sentinum aims to leverage the growing market demand for Bitcoin. The specific site chosen for resumption of mining activities indicates a calculated approach by Hyperscale Data to maximize its operations and profitability in the cryptocurrency space.
news.headline: Hyperscale Data subsidiary to resume Bitcoin mining in Montana by June 10, 2025. (Numbers not provided)

news.summary: AtkinsRéalis Group Inc. reported a strong start to the year with Q1 year-over-year increases of 12% in revenue, 25% in Segment Adjusted EBIT, and 50% in diluted earnings per share. The total backlog increased by 17% compared to December 31, 2024, reaching $20.2 billion as of March 31, 2025. Nuclear revenue hit a quarterly record-high of $538.3 million, marking an 80.3% increase, while Segment Adjusted EBIT for Nuclear reached $62.7 million, a 60.8% increase. The company returned $25.7 million to shareholders through share repurchases in Q1 2025. The net cash generated from operating activities was $39.3 million. The company raised its Nuclear revenue outlook for full year 2025 to between $1.9 billion and $2.0 billion and adjusted its Nuclear Segment Adjusted EBIT outlook to between 11% and 13%. Additionally, the company is revamping its Nuclear annual revenue target to between $2.2 billion and $2.5 billion by 2027. Other financial targets for 2025 – 2027 remain the same as previously announced. Attributable net income to shareholders in Q1 2025 increased by 51.9% compared to Q1 2024. The company's total net limited recourse and recourse debt to Adjusted EBITDA ratio was 1.1 as of March 31, 2025, lower than the ratio of 1.7 a year prior.
news.headline: AtkinsRéalis Group Inc. reports strong Q1 2025 results with 12% revenue increase, $538.3M Nuclear revenue, and $223.9M Linxon revenue. Total backlog at $20.2B. Nuclear revenue outlook raised to $2.0B for 2025, and a $2.5B Nuclear revenue target set for 2027. Net income increased by 51.9% year-over-year to $69.1M. Shareholders received $25.7M through share repurchases. Adjusted EPS at $0.57 for PS&PM. Total Adjusted EBITDA from PS&PM stood at $211.5M.

news.summary: CoreWeave Inc. has made a significant technological advancement by becoming the first to deploy Nvidia Corp.'s cutting-edge GB200 Grace Blackwell systems at scale during the first quarter of 2025. This milestone was announced during the company's first earnings call as a public entity after its March IPO. The deployment of Nvidia's GB200 NVL72 instances at scale on CoreWeave's AI cloud platform positions the company as a comprehensive solution provider for AI development and expands its reach within the AI ecosystem. CoreWeave's CEO, Michael Intrator, highlighted the company's strong financial performance, customer growth, and technical achievements, emphasizing their commitment to delivering superior performance and efficiency. The deployment of the new systems supports leading AI developers like Mistral AI, IBM, and Cohere.
news.headline: CoreWeave is first to deploy Nvidia's GB200 Grace Blackwell systems at scale in Q1 2025. Despite revenue beating estimates, CRWV stock falls over 6%.
